code: import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[review,setReview]=useState("");const[result,setResult]=useState("");const[summary,setSummary]=useState({});const analyze=async()=>{const res=await axios.post("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/analyze/",{text:review});setResult(res.data.sentiment);fetchSummary();};const fetchSummary=async()=>{const res=await axios.get("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/summary/");setSummary(res.data);};useEffect(()=>{fetchSummary();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:20},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Review Analyzer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{rows:"4",cols:"50",onChange:e=>setReview(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:analyze,children:"Analyze"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{children:["Sentiment: ",result]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Summary"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Positive: ",summary.Positive]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Negative: ",summary.Negative]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Neutral: ",summary.Neutral]})]});}export default App;
